projects.title: Products and projects
projects.description: Products I have built: from production Shopify apps serving tens of thousands of merchants, enterprise-grade internal management systems, to personal side projects.

items.title: OPTIS Product Options, Variant
items.description: Production Shopify application for complex product personalization, helping merchants configure option sets, conditional purchasing flows, and price-adjusted add-ons directly on the storefront.
items.meta: Full-stack Engineer / 20,000+ installs / 5-star Shopify App Store
features: Custom product options (dropdown, checkbox, swatch, file upload, text...)
Conditional logic — show/hide options based on customer selections
Live preview — customers see changes in real time on the product page
responsibilities: Full-stack ownership — admin UI, backend APIs & storefront runtime
Involved in the full product development process — from requirements analysis and technical design to feature development and production deployment
Merchant support — resolving technical issues, supporting customers & contributing to growth in installs, reviews, and maintaining a 5★ rating

items.title: OP Color Swatch Variant Images
items.description: Built for Shopify variant experience app that turns complex catalogs into a clean visual buying flow with color swatches, variant-specific image galleries, combined listings, and SEO-friendly product navigation.
items.meta: Full-stack Engineer / 10,000+ installs / 5-star Shopify App Store
items.imageAlt: OP Color Swatch Shopify app variant interface
features: Visual swatches replacing Shopify's default variant selector
Variant-specific image galleries — each variant shows its own images
Combined listings — merge separate products into one unified storefront listing
Collection page swatches — browse variants without entering the product page
responsibilities: Full-stack ownership — admin UI, backend APIs & storefront runtime
Involved in the full product development process — from requirements analysis and technical design to feature development and production deployment
Merchant support — resolving technical issues, supporting customers & contributing to growth in installs, reviews, and maintaining a 5★ rating

items.title: Mid-Autumn
items.description: Personal project during university — an online mooncake selling app, focused on shopping experience, user management, and sales flow on web platform.

items.title: VTI Manufacturing Management Systems

items.meta: VTI Solutions / ReactJS Intern / Internal enterprise tools

about.name: Le Cong Nghia
paragraphs: Born in 2003, I am a Full-stack Developer specializing in building Shopify applications for merchants worldwide. I have end-to-end experience — from backend APIs and admin systems to storefront runtime scripts running directly on merchant themes.
I currently work at BSS Commerce, focusing on Shopify platform development and production web systems built on the React ecosystem — serving over 30,000 merchants on the Shopify App Store.
I write code that is clean, maintainable, and built to scale — and I enjoy exploring new technologies to apply them to real-world production problems.

experienceItems.context: Building Shopify applications for product customization, variant experience and ecommerce solutions serving tens of thousands of merchants on the Shopify App Store.
responsibilities: Storefront logic running on merchant themes
App operations support & technical issue handling
modules: OP Color Swatch Variant Images — 10,000+ installs · 5-star

experienceItems.context: Contributed to 3 internal management systems for manufacturing enterprises: Yamaha WMSX (Smart Warehouse Management), Yamaha QMSX (Quality Management) and FujiX QMSX (Quality Management) — supporting factory operations, quality control and enterprise business workflows.
